title: Remote Photoplethysmography and Motion Tracking Convolutional Neural Network with Bidirectional Long Short-Term Memory
authors: Ling Kong, Kai Xie, Kaixuan Niu, Jianbiao He, Wei Zhang
tldr: 提出非侵入式多模态融合疲劳检测方法，结合RGB和生理特征
relevanceNote: 准确率更高，有助于维护交通安全，推进智能交通领域发展

title: Unlocking the power of multi-modal fusion in 3D object tracking
tldr: 3D单目标跟踪在自动驾驶和机器人中起重要作用，传统方法主要依赖纯LiDAR点云数据
relevanceNote: 提出新方法整合图像模态的优势，填补多模态融合的空白

title: Learning modality feature fusion via transformer for RGBT-tracking
authors: Yujue Cai, Xiubao Sui, Guohua Gu, Qian Chen
tldr: 基于Transformer学习多模态特征融合，提高RGB-T跟踪性能
relevanceNote: 通过注意力机制实现更有效的多模态信息融合

title: Cross-Modal Attention Guided Enhanced Fusion Network for RGB-T Tracking
authors: Jun Liu, Wei Ke, Shuai Wang, Da Yang, Hao Sheng
tldr: 视觉跟踪结合RGB和热红外模态，利用每种模态的有用信息实现更稳健的目标定位
relevanceNote: 强调CNN和Transformer基础上集成多模态信息，提高跟踪鲁棒性

title: Style-Swapping Guided Fusion for RGB-T Tracking: A Dual-Mamba Framework
authors: Qiaoling Zhou, Dawei Ren, Yan Zhang, Xiaobing Yuan
journal: 2025 5th International Conference on Electronic Information Engineering and Computer Technology (EIECT)
tldr: RGB-T跟踪基于Vision Transformer的方法被广泛采用，Mamba因其线性时间复杂度和较小的参数占用而兴起
relevanceNote: 相比ViT-based方法，Mamba提供更好的性能和效率平衡
